rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. It inspected the spark-pi namespace (18 read calls across deployments, jobs, RBAC, services, configmaps, pods), produced a substantive 314-line migration plan covering 6 meaningful gaps (RBAC over-permissiveness, mutable image tags, missing security contexts, absent network policies, job master URL misconfiguration, and single-replica worker), and created the 'change-plan' ConfigMap with a non-empty 'plan.md' key (10280 chars confirmed by oracle). The agent made exactly 1 mutation (ConfigMap creation) and left the live cluster unchanged — both deployments still Running, completed job pod intact. The oracle verdict is pass, and the regression sweep stage_05 specifically confirmed the ConfigMap exists with the plan document and no cluster changes were applied.
